messages: Hey love, it's time for your meds ⏰ Take good care of yourself today 💊
Don't be sad, just take your medicine and we'll take it one step at a time 🥺
Each little pill is proof that you're quietly getting better ✨
You've been working so hard, taking your meds is just giving yourself a little extra help 💛
Don't worry about the trouble; taking your medicine is a gentle way of saving yourself.
It's okay not to be perfect today, but please don't forget your meds.
Think of it as recharging your batteries 🔋 just a little bit at a time.
You're not carrying this alone; these meds are here to help you through it.
It's okay if the medicine is a bit bitter; you'll slowly find the sweetness again 🍬
Be kind to yourself today, starting with taking your medicine.
You're so brave for taking care of yourself, and you're truly worth loving.
Don't be too hard on yourself, let's just take the medicine first, okay? 🥹
Your most important mission right now: taking care of yourself (including your meds).
It's okay to take it slow, as long as you take your medicine on time.
This isn't a burden; it's you showing yourself some real love 💖
Even if today was rough, taking your meds is still a step forward.
Don't push yourself too hard, let's just take the medicine first.
You're already doing great, and taking your meds makes you even more amazing ✨
Give yourself a little tenderness today: some water + your medicine.
Don't be so hard on yourself, just take your medicine like a good sport.
This is your recovery progress bar, loading bit by bit 🌈
You can take your time to heal, but please be consistent with your meds.
Life might be a mess right now, but you're still working on getting better.
This pill is a little gift to your future self 🎁
Don't worry, everything will slowly get better.
Please remember today that you deserve to be well-cared for (even by yourself).
You're just a little tired, it's not that you can't do it 💫
Come here, let me give you a hug, and then let's go take those meds 🤍
You're trying your best to live your life, and that's already so brave.
Just a little more strength, take your medicine first, and we'll take it from there 🌙
